---
title: "Data Preparation"
---

<div class="glass-card">
### Data Strategy
Our analysis is based on dynamic data retrieval from the **YÖK Atlas** system. By using the `thestats` package, we ensure our study is fully reproducible and updated with the latest 2025 statistics.
</div>

## Data Dictionary
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| University_Type | State or Foundation |
| Base_Score | Minimum score for placement |
| Staff_Count | Total number of academic staff |

*(Veri temizleme adımlarını burada anlatacağız)*
